Loops is an email platform for sending b: Loops is an email platform for sending beautiful transactional and marketing emails. Manage contacts, trigger automations with events, and send transactional emails from your workflows.
Your Loops API key. Generate one at [Set: Your Loops API key. Generate one at [Settings → API](https://app.loops.so/settings?page=api) in your Loops dashboard.
Creates a new contact in Loops. Returns: Creates a new contact in Loops. Returns an error if a contact with the given email already exists.
Sends an event to Loops for a contact. E: Sends an event to Loops for a contact. Events can trigger email automations configured in your Loops dashboard.
Sends a transactional email to a contact: Sends a transactional email to a contact using a pre-built template in Loops.
Finds a contact in Loops by their email: Finds a contact in Loops by their email address or user ID.
Permanently deletes a contact from Loops: Permanently deletes a contact from Loops by their email address or user ID.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: 将一个自定义 API 调用到一个特定的终点
The email address of the contact.
Your internal user ID for this contact.
Set subscription status. Leave as \"No C: Set subscription status. Leave as "No Change" to preserve existing status on update.
A group/segment to assign to this contac: A group/segment to assign to this contact.
Subscribe or unsubscribe this contact fr: Subscribe or unsubscribe this contact from mailing lists. Provide list IDs as keys with `true` (subscribe) or `false` (unsubscribe) as values.
Additional custom contact properties as: Additional custom contact properties as key-value pairs. Reserved fields (email, firstName, lastName, userId, subscribed, userGroup, source) are ignored here.
The email address of the contact to send: The email address of the contact to send the event for.
Your internal user ID of the contact (us: Your internal user ID of the contact (used if email is not provided).
The name of the event to send (e.g. \"si: The name of the event to send (e.g. "signup", "purchase", "password-reset"). Must match an event set up in Loops.
Optional key-value pairs to attach to th: Optional key-value pairs to attach to the event (used in email templates).
Optional contact property updates to app: Optional contact property updates to apply when the event is sent.
The ID of the transactional email templa: The ID of the transactional email template in Loops (find it in your Loops dashboard).
If true, the recipient will be added to: If true, the recipient will be added to your Loops audience if they are not already a contact.
Key-value pairs to populate dynamic vari: Key-value pairs to populate dynamic variables in your email template (e.g. { "name": "Alice", "resetUrl": "https://..." }).
The field to search by. The Loops API on: The field to search by. The Loops API only allows one search parameter.
The email address or user ID to search f: The email address or user ID to search for.
The email address of the contact to dele: The email address of the contact to delete.
Your internal user ID of the contact to: Your internal user ID of the contact to delete.
